aboutFounder.name: Viktor Zlatovchen
aboutFounder.lead: I believe interior design is not simply about beauty, but about creating a refined atmosphere that quietly elevates the way people live every day.
aboutFounder.text: As the founder of Zlatovchen Art Design, I’ve always believed that interior design is more than creating beautiful spaces — it is about crafting environments that inspire, comfort, and bring emotional clarity through proportion, materiality, and timeless composition.
aboutFounder.imageAlt: Viktor Zlatovchen, founder of Zlatovchen Art Design

testimonialShowcase.quote: Every detail felt intentional, refined, and beautifully resolved from beginning to end.
testimonialShowcase.note: Working with Zlatovchen Art Design was seamless throughout the entire process.
testimonialShowcase.author: Luke Collins

items.title: Luxury Residential Design
items.description: We create refined living spaces tailored to your lifestyle and personal taste. Every detail — from layout to materials — is carefully curated to achieve a timeless, elegant, and comfortable home environment.

items.title: Modern Commercial Interior
items.description: We design functional and visually compelling commercial spaces that reflect your brand identity. Our approach focuses on creating environments that enhance customer experience and support business growth.

items.title: Living Room and Kitchen Design
items.description: We transform the most important areas of your home into cohesive and inviting spaces. The design balances aesthetics and functionality, ensuring comfort for everyday living and social interaction.

processTimeline.title: A Refined Design Process
processTimeline.subtitle: A composed, transparent journey shaped through clarity, thoughtful guidance, and a careful attention to every detail.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We begin with a detailed consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and expectations. This step allows us to align on goals and define the direction of the project.

steps.title: Contract Proposal
steps.description: We prepare a tailored proposal outlining the scope, timeline, and budget. Clear structure and transparency ensure confidence before moving forward.

steps.title: Initial Concept
steps.description: Our team develops a refined design concept, including layout, materials, and visual direction. Every element is carefully considered to match your vision.

steps.title: Project Implementation
steps.description: We manage the full execution process, coordinating contractors and ensuring every detail meets the highest standards of quality and precision.

steps.title: Finishing Touches
steps.description: The final stage is about refinement. We complete styling, balance the composition, and ensure the finished space feels polished, harmonious, and truly exceptional.

fullWidthImageBand.imageAlt: Luxury interior with refined architectural lines and warm atmosphere

founderEditorial.title: I have always believed
founderEditorial.textLeft: that interior design is more than just creating beautiful spaces — it is about crafting environments that inspire comfort, calm, and a lasting emotional connection.
founderEditorial.textRight: My approach to design is centered around timeless beauty, measured restraint, and modern functionality — each interior should reflect the unique identity of the person who lives within it.

statementBanner.title: With meticulous attention to detail and an unwavering commitment to quality, we design spaces that are as exceptional as you are.

formSection.title: We Are Ready to Help You Elevate Your Space
formSection.description: Share a few details about your project and we will get back to you with a thoughtful, tailored response.
formSection.note: We usually reply within 1–2 business days.

faq.title: Your Queries Answered
faq.subtitle: A few essential answers about our process, collaboration, and design approach.

groups.imageAlt: Elegant neutral interior with refined seating area

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: We provide residential and commercial interior design, including space planning, furniture selection, and custom design solutions. Our services also include project management and renovation design.

items.question: How do I start a project with your studio?
items.answer: We begin with a personal consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and spatial needs. From there, we shape a tailored design direction, timeline, and scope for the project.

items.question: Do you work on full-home transformations?
items.answer: Yes, we design complete residential environments as well as selected rooms. Each project is approached with the same level of detail, cohesion, and material sensitivity.

groups.imageAlt: Luxury living room with sculpted furniture composition

items.question: Can you work remotely on a project?
items.answer: Yes, we can collaborate remotely depending on the scope and location. We structure the process carefully to maintain clarity, visual precision, and a seamless client experience.

items.question: Do you assist with furniture and material selection?
items.answer: Absolutely. We curate furniture, finishes, lighting, and decor to ensure that every element supports the broader atmosphere and identity of the interior.

items.question: How long does an interior design project usually take?
items.answer: The timeline depends on the scale and complexity of the project. After the initial consultation, we provide a clear process outline with estimated phases and delivery timing.
